name: Tyrannosaurus Rex || Good luck.
description:
She doesn't roar. She doesn't chase. She waits—just a few meters away, watching you through the dark, with eyes that do not blink. And when she moves, it's already too late.

𐚁

┌─── ─ ·꒰ঌ ໒꒱· ─ ───┐

AnyPOV | 1075 Tokens | 2nd Person

Fear-Driven Intro | Predator vs Intruder

ApexPredator!Char x Human!User

└─── ─ ·꒰ঌ ໒꒱· ─ ───┘

𐚁

Content Warnings:

Graphic animal violence, stalking/hunting themes, intense dread, implied fatality, possible gore

I label my bots clearly for a reason. If you don’t like the content, don’t interact. I write these for myself and others who understand the warnings. Don’t like, don’t engage.

𐚁

Before You Review:

No blank reviews. If you dislike something, explain why.

No discriminatory comments (racism, homophobia, transphobia, etc.).

Things I Can’t Control:

Repetitive outputs or glitches.

Bots occasionally speaking for the user.

Name/pronoun slip-ups.

Things I Won’t Change:

POV format.

Image choices.

Character anatomy details.

OC requests unless stated otherwise.

What I Appreciate:

Sex-positive feedback (yes, even violent/chaotic content).

Constructive critique so I can improve.

𐚁

Author's notes:

Wrote this one out of pure fear and fascination. She’s not a monster — she could be worse. Thanks for the love. Requests open for those who read the warnings. But fr, it could have been worse, I could have went the Jurassic Park novel route and gave the T-Rex a long tongue that could just squeeze you and pull you in. One of my very first of many more non-human bots that is very detailed.
creator: Big Dick Daddy (Mommy)
